results.title: The Easy Trick to Convert Celsius to Fahrenheit - PrepScholar
results.snippet: These formulas will give you the exact conversion from one unit of temperature to the other: Celsius to Fahrenheit Formula : (°C * 1.8) + 32 = °F Fahrenheit to Celsius Formula : (°F - 32) / 1.8 = °C For example, say the temperature outside is 18 °C and you want to know what this would equal in Fahrenheit .
